plugin.name: eqnamer
plugin.description:
NEAC's event naming plugin.
Uses a set of polygons and points of interest to set the region name description of seismic events, with several customizable templates that are used in different situations.
Each template should be a list of strings. Each string will have any @placeholders@ interpolated, any emtpy strings will be removed, then the resulting nonempty strings will be glued together with ', '.
The available placeholders are:
- @epi_country@: Name of the country containing the epicentre, if any. In cases where the event falls in a polygon with a special crust type (e.g. "Coastal" or "Offshore"), this will be prepended to the country name. e.g. "Japan", "Coastal India", "Offshore" - @poi@: Place name of a point of interest. e.g. "Singleton, NSW", "Paris" - @poi_country@: Name of the country containing the point of interest. e.g. "Australia", "France" - @dist@: Distance from the point of interest to the epicentre in kilometres. e.g. 125 - @dir@: Compass direction from the point of interest to the epicentre, e.g. SW

parameter.name: citiesPath
parameter.description: Path to an XML file containing a cities dataset, in the same format as the cities.xml shipping with seiscomp.

parameter.name: regionsPath
parameter.description: Path to a GeoJSON or BNA file containing a collection of named polygons.

parameter.name: countriesPath
parameter.description: Path to a GeoJSON or BNA file containing a collection of named polygons describing countries, with the country name in the property Primary_ID.

parameter.name: homeCountry
parameter.description: Country to treat as the home country. If both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the home country, the special "homeCountry" template strings will be used.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Template used for non-reviewed events when both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the configured home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: precise
parameter.description: Template used for reviewed events when both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the configured home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Template used for non-reviewed events when the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the same country, but not the home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @poi_country@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: precise
parameter.description: Template used for reviewed events when the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the same country, but not the home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @poi_country@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Template used for non-reviewed events when the POI and epicenter fall in different countries. Supported placeholders are @epi_country@, @poi_country@, @dist@, @dir@, and @poi@.

parameter.name: precise
